errors.message: Your token has not been granted the required scopes to execute this query. The 'id' field requires one of the following scopes: ['read:project'], but your token has only been granted the: ['gist', 'read:org', 'repo', 'workflow'] scopes. Please modify your token's scopes at: https://github.com/settings/tokens.
